creator: ats@first.gmd.de
text:
ports/biology/molden has a checksum error. Seems like the tarball on
the mastersite has been repackaged. 
With a new make makesum, it looks like it builds ok, so probably
only a new checksum is required.

Fix: 

Update the distinfo file with the new checksum and put it into CVS ?
How-To-Repeat: fetch the files from the mastersite and do a make checksum.
